DiagnosisRoom.closeRoomHint: Close this room without confirming its conclusion.

details.ai_proof_missing: Review the diagnosis-room notification payload; AI delivery cannot be distinguished from raw alert forwarding until output digest proof is retained.
details.ai_review_failed: AI review failed before a final conclusion was recorded.
details.ai_review_in_progress: AI review is still investigating this evidence snapshot.
details.ai_review_queued: Automatic diagnosis has started from alert evidence. Wait for the first AI report or refresh the room state before sending an operator prompt.
details.collect_evidence: AI requested additional evidence before final confirmation.
details.continue_ai_review: Continue the AI conversation or collect the requested evidence.
details.delivery_failed: At least one required AI notification phase failed. Retry the failed delivery before treating the room as delivered.
details.delivery_incomplete: {ready} of {required} AI notification phases are complete. Retain assistant update, final conclusion, and close notification proof before accepting delivery.
details.delivery_not_started: Operator-confirmed conclusion is retained, but AI delivery proof has not started. Verify assistant update, final conclusion, and close notification proof before treating the room as delivered.
details.human_review: Review the AI conclusion and add verified operator evidence if confidence is not sufficient.
details.improve_confidence: Collect more evidence before final confirmation.
details.notification_failed: Review the failed diagnosis-room notification before relying on downstream handoff.
details.reassess_evidence: Supplemental evidence has been submitted, but the latest AI turn has not retained matching review proof. Ask AI to reassess the submitted evidence before confirmation.
details.review_ai_report: AI review is ready for operator confirmation.
details.review_conclusion: AI produced a conclusion. Review it before closing the room.
details.start_ai_review: Send the first prompt so AI can produce a diagnosis report.
details.workflow_failed: Inspect the workflow failure and decide whether to restart the diagnosis room.
details.workflow_unavailable: Temporal reports workflow status {status}. Inspect the workflow before continuing the room.

audit.initialPending: AI diagnosis has not produced the initial report for this subreport.
audit.initialDone: Initial AI report recorded {confidence} confidence and {count, plural, one {# evidence request} other {# evidence requests}}.
audit.supplementalPending: Evidence collection starts after AI produces an initial report.
audit.supplementalFailed: Evidence collection is blocked until the failed diagnosis run is retried.
audit.supplementalBlocked: Resolve {work} before confidence can be raised or confirmed.{attached, select, none {} other { {attached} supplemental or collected evidence items are already retained.}}
audit.supplementalResidual: Residual guidance remains documented: {residual}. The operator can accept this uncertainty or collect more evidence before confirmation.{attached, select, none {} other { {attached} supplemental or collected evidence items are already retained.}}
audit.supplementalRetained: {count, plural, one {# supplemental or collected evidence item is} other {# supplemental or collected evidence items are}} retained for the AI diagnosis path.
audit.supplementalCleared: AI requested evidence, and no open evidence work remains on the latest turn.
audit.supplementalNone: AI did not require supplemental evidence for this subreport.
audit.confidencePending: Confidence revision waits for the first AI diagnosis turn.
audit.confidenceFailed: Confidence revision stopped because the diagnosis run failed.
audit.confidenceIncreased: Confidence increased from {initial} to {latest} after evidence review.
audit.confidenceDecreased: Confidence moved from {initial} to {latest}; keep the evidence trail available for operator review.
audit.confidenceSame: Confidence remains {latest} after the latest AI turn.
audit.finalPending: Final decision waits for an AI diagnosis room to produce the initial report.
audit.finalFailed: AI diagnosis failed before a final conclusion.
audit.finalFailedReason: AI diagnosis failed before a final conclusion: {reason}
audit.finalEvidence: Final decision waits for the operator to provide the requested evidence and rerun AI review.
audit.finalReview: AI conclusion is ready for operator confirmation before final report delivery.
audit.finalConfirmedVersion: Operator confirmed the AI conclusion as {version}.
audit.finalClear: {title} has no open AI evidence work.

finalNotification.fallback: Final notification readiness is unavailable; complete diagnosis review before retrying final delivery.

Alerts.openDiagnosisHint: Create an AI room from the linked evidence.
Alerts.replayUnavailableDetail: Replay did not start a report workflow, so there is no downstream notification proof to inspect yet.

detail.ready: Replay accepted, evidence was retained, and automatic diagnosis has proof in this response.
detail.review: Replay produced usable proof, with downstream AI or notification evidence to review.
detail.pending: Replay proof is partial; verify asynchronous notification delivery in downstream timelines.

replayTrace.triggerStarted: Report workflow {workflow} accepted run {run} for correlation {correlation}.
replayTrace.triggerNotStarted: Replay did not start a report workflow for correlation {correlation} because no evidence snapshots were available.
replayTrace.evidenceRetained: {events, plural, one {# event loaded} other {# events loaded}}, {groups, plural, one {# group built} other {# groups built}}, {snapshots, plural, one {# snapshot saved} other {# snapshots saved}}.
replayTrace.evidenceMissing: No evidence snapshots were created for this replay window.
replayTrace.aiDataMissing: Replay response did not include automatic diagnosis data.
replayTrace.aiPolicyMissing: No automatic diagnosis policy matched this replay output.
replayTrace.aiMatched: {policies, plural, one {# policy matched} other {# policies matched}} {snapshots, plural, one {# snapshot} other {# snapshots}} and started {rooms, plural, one {# room} other {# rooms}}.
replayTrace.aiConfirmed: {count, plural, one {# snapshot already has a human-confirmed conclusion.} other {# snapshots already have human-confirmed conclusions.}}
replayTrace.aiSkipped: {count, plural, one {# snapshot remains for manual room creation.} other {# snapshots remain for manual room creation.}}
replayTrace.notificationUnavailable: Notification proof is unavailable until replay starts a report workflow.
replayTrace.notificationRooms: {count, plural, one {# automatic diagnosis room started; verify its assistant and final-ready notifications in the retained timeline.} other {# automatic diagnosis rooms started; verify their assistant and final-ready notifications in the retained timelines.}}
replayTrace.notificationConfirmed: {count, plural, one {# snapshot already has a human-confirmed conclusion, so no new diagnosis room or consultation notification was required.} other {# snapshots already have human-confirmed conclusions, so no new diagnosis rooms or consultation notifications were required.}}
replayTrace.notificationNoRoom: Automatic diagnosis matched this replay, but no room workflow was accepted. Review the AI diagnosis handoff before checking notification delivery.
replayTrace.notificationReportDelivery: Replay accepted the report workflow. Verify asynchronous notification delivery in the final report delivery timeline because this response does not include delivery results.
